perspectives.description: Sarah is the team leader who promised her team a vacation if they met their sales target. She is torn between honoring her commitment and ensuring the company's financial stability.
A member of Sarah's team who worked hard to meet the sales target and is looking forward to the promised vacation as a reward for their efforts. They feel betrayed if the promise is broken.
An employee in another department of the company who may face layoffs or budget cuts if the financial situation worsens. They are indirectly affected by Sarah's decision regarding the vacation.
